summary: 309 test specifications defined across 8 layers. 230 feature/API/entity/UI tests (196 P1, 31 P2, 3 P3), 38 integration scenarios (33 P1, 5 P2), 41 runtime safety specs (all P1). 10 AI-specific safety tests covering guardrails, fabrication detection, cross-idea isolation, and function calling loop limits.

critical_risks: AI function calling infinite loops (Facilitator max 3 rounds, Board Agent max 10 rounds)
AI fabrication in BRD generation (Summarizing AI highest risk agent)
Cross-idea context isolation (AI must never leak data between ideas)
Idea state machine integrity (5 states, 8 valid transitions, many invalid paths)
Merge operation atomicity (creates new idea, closes originals, transfers ownership)
WebSocket connection lifecycle (leaks, reconnection, idle timeout)
Rate limit counter accuracy under concurrent access
AI processing abort-and-restart on new message (no partial state)

next_commands.command: /strategy_planner Read handover at docs/04-test-architecture/handover.json. All specs and test architecture ready for milestone planning.
next_commands.description: Start milestone planning and wave strategy
